g.title: dns
g.text: 2. Browser resolves Route53 alias to CloudFront

g.title: static
g.text: 3. CloudFront + edge WAF fetch storefront from S3

g.title: faro
g.text: 4. Browser sends Faro page load, vitals, session telemetry

g.title: oauth
g.text: 6. Cognito redirects to Google and exchanges code with PKCE

g.title: accountPopulate
g.text: 7. Browser receives Cognito tokens and populates account name/email

g.title: inventory
g.text: 9. ALB forwards to inventory-service with trace context

g.title: cart
g.text: 12. cart-service persists cart state to DynamoDB

g.title: accountSave
g.text: 14. Shopper saves shipping address and wallet metadata

g.title: account
g.text: 15. account-service persists profile, address, wallet metadata

g.title: telemetry
g.text: 17. Services emit metrics, logs, traces to Alloy

g.title: grafana
g.text: 18. Alloy and Faro forward telemetry to Grafana Cloud

g.title: k6
g.text: 19. Grafana Cloud k6 runs regional, spike, browser checks

g.title: k6Results
g.text: 20. k6 publishes run metrics, checks, trace correlation
